docs: Sentinel — a non-custodial, on-chain liquidation & stop-loss guardian for
Flash Trade, powered by MagicBlock Ephemeral Rollups.
Flow:
1. initialize_vault   (base)  — vault PDA becomes the Flash position owner
2. register_guard     (base)  — store the rule + create the price feed
3. delegate_guard     (base)  — delegate guard + price feed to the rollup
4. schedule_monitor   (rollup)— schedule the crank: no server from here on
5. push_price         (rollup)— Pyth Lazer / demo feed updates, gasless
6. evaluate           (rollup)— crank flips `triggered` when the rule trips
7. commit_guard       (rollup)— commit + undelegate the triggered guard
8. execute_protection (base)  — permissionless CPI to Flash close_position

accounts.name: vault
docs: closed rent/proceeds. mut: lamports change on close. Bound to guard.owner
via seeds, and cross-checked against guard.vault below.

accounts.name: flash_program
docs: constants::FLASH_PROGRAM_ID; for the devnet harness we accept the passed
program so we can point at the interface-faithful flash_stub.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Anyone can pay/submit; carries no authority. Earns `keeper_bounty`.

accounts.name: vault
docs: rent, and signs the CPI via invoke_signed. mut: lamports change on open.

accounts.name: owner
docs: with the Flash account layout; the seed binds the vault to this trader.

accounts.name: flash_program
docs: constants::FLASH_PROGRAM_ID; for the devnet harness we accept the passed
program so we can point at the interface-faithful flash_stub.

accounts.name: payer
docs: The actor paying + signing — the wallet itself, or a scoped session key.

accounts.name: session_token
docs: Optional session token authorizing `payer` to act for `authority`.

errors.name: NotTriggered
errors.msg: Guard rule has not been triggered yet

errors.name: BadPrice
errors.msg: Price feed is stale or zero

errors.name: VaultMismatch
errors.msg: Wrong vault authority for this guard

errors.name: MarketMismatch
errors.msg: Provided Flash accounts do not match the guard's market

errors.name: NotEnoughAccounts
errors.msg: Not enough accounts supplied for the Flash close CPI

errors.name: WrongKind
errors.msg: Wrong guard kind for this instruction

errors.name: SettleLocked
errors.msg: Settlement is time-locked (anti-MEV delay not elapsed)

types.name: ActionType
docs: What the guard does when it trips.

types.name: GridConfig
docs: An autonomous grid / DCA bot config. Delegated to the ER and ticked by a
scheduled crank: every tick it computes which grid level the price is in and
records a "fill" when the level changes — the bot's decisions run entirely
on-chain in the rollup, gaslessly, with no server. (Rung execution on Flash
reuses the vault CPI path, same as `execute_protection`.)

types.name: GuardConfig
docs: A guard: the rule + everything needed to rebuild the Flash CPI. This is the
account delegated to the Ephemeral Rollup and ticked by the on-chain crank —
no server watches the price, the rollup does. One vault can own many guards
(keyed by `guard_id`) → a portfolio of protected positions.

types.name: GuardKind
docs: Whether a guard protects an existing position or is a pending limit ENTRY.

types.name: OpenProtectedParams
docs: Mirrors Flash `OpenPositionParams { price, collateral, size, side }`.
`side` is the Flash `Side` byte: 1 = Long, 2 = Short (0 = None).

types.name: PortfolioGuard
docs: Per-vault portfolio risk guard: close ALL positions if aggregate equity drops
more than `max_drawdown_bps` from its high-water mark.

types.name: PriceFeed
docs: A lightweight price feed account, owned by Sentinel and delegated to the ER
alongside the guard. In production this is fed by Pyth Lazer (sub-ms updates);
for the demo a price-pusher writes into it gaslessly inside the rollup.

types.name: RuleType
docs: The per-trader vault is a *data-less* PDA at [VAULT_SEED, trader]. It owns the
Flash position and signs the open/close CPIs via invoke_signed — but holds no
account data, so it can also be the System `create_account` payer for the
position (a data-carrying account cannot). It simply holds lamports (the
trader's deposit) and is a deterministic signing authority. Metadata lives in
GuardConfig, so there is no Vault account struct.
The rule a guard enforces.

types.name: Strategy
docs: A published copy-trading strategy: a leader's guard *template* expressed as
offsets from entry (so each follower's guard adapts to their own entry price).

constants.name: FLASH_PROGRAM_ID
docs: Flash Trade perpetuals program id (flash-trade/flash-perpetuals).
The Flash program is passed as an account to `execute_protection` and checked
against this id; redeploys on localnet can override the check via the account.
